messages.panelDescription: Staff replies, customer replies, and internal notes in one thread.

assignment.description: Move this complaint to another active team member or clear the assignment.

business.name: Business name
business.ownersOnly: Only owners can edit business details.

layout.trustBuiltBody: Transparent quotes and a verifiable record customers can rely on.

actions.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
actions.chooseAccountType: Choose an account type to continue.
actions.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
actions.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent. Check your email to sign in.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Choose the account type that fits how you will use Revora.
signup.superAdminNote: Super admin is never selectable here. Staff access requires an invitation.
signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
signup.chooseAccountType: Choose an account type to continue.

accountTypes.businessOwnerDescription: Create a workspace for your workshop, detailing center, tire shop, or service team.
accountTypes.customerDescription: Access quotes, approvals, jobs, complaints, and documents shared by a business.
accountTypes.staffDescription: Join a business team using an invitation from an owner or manager.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page
notFound.description: The page may have moved, or the link is no longer valid. Let's get you back on track.

error.title: That didn't work as expected
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or head back to safety. If it keeps happening, please let the team know.

globalError.title: The app ran into a problem
globalError.description: Something went wrong while loading Revora. Reloading usually fixes it.

metadata.signupDescription: Choose the account type that fits how you will use Revora.
metadata.portalDescription: Your linked accounts and complaint history.
metadata.adminDescription: Tenant and usage metrics across all of Revora.

getStarted.title: Get started
getStarted.description: The foundation is ready. Add your customers and configure your business profile.

portalHome.title: Portal
portalHome.description: Your linked accounts and complaint history.
portalHome.noLinkedAccountDescription: Use the same email address your workshop has on file, or ask them to invite/link your customer record. Once it matches, your quotes, jobs, complaints, and documents will appear here automatically.
portalHome.complaintsDescription: View the current status of your active and past complaints.
portalHome.complaintsEmpty: When you need support, submit a complaint and track the response here.
portalHome.reviewAndApproveDescription: Review the details and approve with your digital signature.

adminOverview.title: Platform overview
adminOverview.description: Tenant and usage metrics across all of Revora.

empty.title: No customers yet
empty.description: Add your first customer to start linking vehicles, quotes, jobs, and documents.

dashboardVehicles.title: Vehicles
dashboardVehicles.description: Vehicle records linked to customers and service history.
dashboardVehicles.searchPlaceholder: Search plate, make, model, customer, or VIN

empty.noneDescription: Add the first vehicle to start linking service history, quotes, and documents.
empty.matchDescription: Try a different search term or clear the filters.

error.title: Vehicles failed to load
error.description: The vehicle list could not be loaded right now. Try again or return later.

new.title: Add vehicle
new.description: Create a vehicle record and link it to an existing customer.
new.emptyDescription: Create a customer first, then add their vehicle.

edit.title: Edit vehicle
edit.description: Update the vehicle and keep it linked to the correct customer.
edit.emptyDescription: Create or restore a customer before editing vehicle ownership.

dashboardJobsPage.title: Jobs
dashboardJobsPage.description: Work orders created from approved quotes.

empty.title: No jobs yet
empty.description: Approved work orders will appear here once they are created from quotes.

empty.title: No jobs match
empty.description: Try a different search or reset the filters.

dashboardQuotations.title: Quotations
dashboardQuotations.description: Quotes, product transparency, and digital approvals.

empty.title: No quotations yet
empty.description: Quotes created in this business will appear here once they are saved.

dashboardComplaints.title: Complaints
dashboardComplaints.description: Customer complaints, internal follow-up, and resolution tracking.
dashboardComplaints.accessRestrictedDescription: Complaint handling is restricted to staff roles.
dashboardComplaints.accessRestricted: You do not have access to complaint management.

queue.title: Complaint queue
queue.description: Manage status, severity, assignees, and threaded replies.

empty.title: No complaints yet
empty.description: Complaints submitted by customers will appear here once they are linked to this business.

library.title: Document library
library.description: Stored files linked to quotes, complaints, jobs, and customers.

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.description: Upload contracts, PDFs, and service records to keep them linked to quotes, jobs, and complaints.

portalJobs.title: Jobs
portalJobs.description: Track the progress of your work orders.

list.title: Your jobs
list.description: Open a job to see its latest updates and attachments.

empty.noLinkedJobsTitle: No jobs are linked to your account yet
empty.noLinkedJobsDescription: Once the workshop creates a job for one of your vehicles or quotes, it will appear here.
empty.title: No jobs linked to your account yet
empty.description: Once the workshop creates a job, it will appear here.

portalQuotes.title: Quotes
portalQuotes.description: Review and approve quotations from your workshop.

list.title: Your quotes
list.description: Open a quote to see the line items and approve it.

portalComplaints.title: Complaints
portalComplaints.description: Track the status of every complaint you have submitted.

empty.noLinkedTitle: No complaints are available for this portal account yet.
empty.noLinkedDescription: Use the same email address your workshop has on file, or ask them to invite/link your customer record.
empty.noComplaintsDescription: When you need support, submit a complaint and track the response here.

history.title: Complaint history
history.description: Status, severity, and linked business for each complaint.

portalDocuments.title: Documents
portalDocuments.description: Files shared by your workshop and linked to your account.

library.title: Your documents
library.description: Contracts, PDFs, and images tied to your jobs, quotes, or complaints.

empty.noLinkedDescription: The workshop has not shared any customer-linked documents yet.
empty.noDocumentsDescription: The workshop has not shared any customer-linked documents yet.

portalSettings.title: Settings
portalSettings.description: Read-only profile and account details for the customer portal.

empty.title: No linked customer account
empty.description: We could not find a customer record linked to your sign-in. Use the same email address your workshop has on file, or ask them to invite/link you.

summary.title: Signed-in account
summary.description: The email and linked customer records associated with this portal account.
summary.recordsValue: {count, plural, one {# customer account} other {# customer accounts}}

accounts.title: Linked customer accounts
accounts.description: These records are available through the portal and are kept separate by tenant.

security.title: Security and communication
security.description: Portal access is linked to your signed-in email. Editable customer settings are not enabled yet.
security.body: Communication preferences, delivery channels, and account edits are managed by the workshop for now.

adminTenants.title: Tenants
adminTenants.cardDescription: Owner, team size, and activity per tenant.

empty.title: No businesses yet
empty.description: Tenant records will appear here once a business signs up and creates its workspace.

adminUsers.title: Users
adminUsers.description: All registered platform users and their tenant footprint.
adminUsers.cardDescription: Platform signups, super-admin status, and tenant linkage.

empty.title: No users yet
empty.description: Users will appear here once the platform starts collecting signups and memberships.

adminSubscriptions.title: Subscriptions
adminSubscriptions.cardDescription: Stripe-backed tenants and their current plan state.

empty.title: No subscriptions yet
empty.description: Stripe-backed subscription records will appear here once tenants are billed.

adminBilling.title: Billing
adminBilling.cardDescription: Read-only platform billing overview backed by subscription data.
adminBilling.note: Stripe webhook sync keeps this view current; plan changes and portal actions still happen in the tenant billing flow.

empty.title: No subscription records yet
empty.description: Subscription rows will appear here once Stripe starts syncing tenant billing.

adminAuditLogs.title: Audit logs
adminAuditLogs.description: Cross-tenant record changes and administrative actions.
adminAuditLogs.cardDescription: Latest create, update, and delete events across the platform.

empty.title: No audit events yet
empty.description: Administrative activity will appear here once tenants and platform operators start making changes.

adminNotifications.title: Notifications
adminNotifications.cardDescription: Delivery state across email, SMS, and channel integrations.

empty.title: No notifications yet
empty.description: Queued and delivered notifications will appear here once the platform sends activity.

adminAnalytics.title: Analytics
adminAnalytics.description: Cross-tenant activity, operations, and growth signals.
adminAnalytics.cardDescription: Businesses with the most quote and complaint activity.

empty.title: No tenant activity yet
